'''naduzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamics|dynamics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamics|dynamics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| naduzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædizith|nædizith]] || [[word:nædizij|nædizij]] || [[word:nædizish|nædizish]] || [[word:nædizi|nædizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:naduduzuth|naduduzuth]] || [[word:naduduzuj|naduduzuj]] || [[word:naduduzush|naduduzush]] || [[word:naduduzu|naduduzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:naduzuth|naduzuth]] || [[word:naduzuj|naduzuj]] || [[word:naduzush|naduzush]] || [[word:naduzu|naduzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadufzufth|nadufzufth]] || [[word:nadufzufj|nadufzufj]] || [[word:nadufzufsh|nadufzufsh]] || [[word:nadufzuf|nadufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:naduzuthu|naduzuthu]] || [[word:naduzuju|naduzuju]] || [[word:naduzushu|naduzushu]] || [[word:naduzuku|naduzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:naduzuth|naduzuth]] || [[word:naduzuj|naduzuj]] || [[word:naduzush|naduzush]] || [[word:naduzu|naduzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:naduzuthul|naduzuthul]] || [[word:naduzujul|naduzujul]] || [[word:naduzushul|naduzushul]] || [[word:naduzukul|naduzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:naduzuuthuthu|naduzuuthuthu]] || [[word:naduzuujuju|naduzuujuju]] || [[word:naduzuushushu|naduzuushushu]] || [[word:naduzuuku|naduzuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:naduzuthun|naduzuthun]] || [[word:naduzujun|naduzujun]] || [[word:naduzushun|naduzushun]] || [[word:naduzukun|naduzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:naduzuthuoro|naduzuthuoro]] || [[word:naduzujuoro|naduzujuoro]] || [[word:naduzushuoro|naduzushuoro]] || [[word:naduzukuoro|naduzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
